laws.title: Punishment for Rape
laws.description: Amends the punishment for rape in the Indian Penal Code.
laws.simpleExplanation: The minimum jail time for rape has been increased from seven years to ten years.

punishments.description: Rigorous imprisonment for a term which shall not be less than ten years, but which may extend to imprisonment for life, and shall also be liable to fine.

relatedSections.description: Omission of clause (i) regarding specific categories of rape.

laws.title: Punishment for rape on woman under sixteen years of age
laws.description: Inserts a specific punishment for rape committed against a girl under the age of 16.
laws.simpleExplanation: Raping a girl under 16 now carries a minimum of 20 years in jail, which can extend to life imprisonment for the rest of the person's natural life.

punishments.description: Rigorous imprisonment for a term which shall not be less than twenty years, but which may extend to imprisonment for life (remainder of natural life), and fine paid to victim.

relatedSections.description: Sub-section added to the main section regarding rape.

laws.title: Punishment for rape on woman under twelve years of age
laws.description: New section providing punishment for rape of a girl under 12 years, including the death penalty.
laws.simpleExplanation: Raping a child under 12 is now punishable by at least 20 years in jail, life imprisonment, or death.

punishments.description: Rigorous imprisonment for not less than twenty years, life imprisonment for remainder of natural life, or death, and fine.

laws.title: Punishment for gang rape on woman under sixteen years of age
laws.description: New section for gang rape involving a victim under 16 years of age.
laws.simpleExplanation: If a group of people rapes a girl under 16, every person involved will be jailed for the rest of their natural life.

punishments.description: Imprisonment for life, which shall mean imprisonment for the remainder of that person's natural life, and with fine.

laws.title: Punishment for gang rape on woman under twelve years of age
laws.description: New section for gang rape involving a victim under 12 years of age.
laws.simpleExplanation: If a group of people rapes a child under 12, the punishment is life imprisonment for the rest of their lives or the death penalty.

punishments.description: Imprisonment for life for the remainder of natural life, or death, and fine.
